description: Use this API to purge an OPF linear constraint dependency record, including all of its participating variables, from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = purge_opf_lnceqn(iqid)

parameters.name: iqid
parameters.description: Linear constraint equation identification number. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: linear constraint equation number not found.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
